## Request

What capability or improvement do you want?

## Motivation

What problem does it solve?

## Suggested Area

- [ ] New diagnostic dimension
- [ ] New source-family guidance
- [ ] New cross-layer sharing rule
- [ ] New tool-portable team practice
- [ ] New scenario playbook
- [ ] GitHub packaging improvement

## Example

Give a concrete user request, repo situation, or collaboration problem this should support.
